description: Style Note Cut a dash with these low top shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket. Product Details Brown derby shoe with central lace-ups and overlays A padded tongue and inner TPU outsole with an upraised heel Material and Care Leather Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
